description: Implement hybrid agent calling strategy with Task tool (primary) and ccw cli (fallback) to improve reliability. Create agent-caller.js utility with dynamic retry mechanism, timeout control, and exponential backoff. Refactor plan.md to use new utility.
approach: Phase 3 implements a mixed agent calling strategy to improve reliability: (1) Try Task tool first (more reliable, built-in error handling, automatic JSON parsing), (2) Fall back to ccw cli if Task tool fails (more flexible, independent). Create agent-caller.js utility in _internal/ directory that encapsulates both methods with intelligent retry logic (3-5 attempts based on error type), timeout control (120s), and exponential backoff. This builds on Phase 1's logger.js and json-parser.js utilities. The approach adds ~100 lines but significantly improves reliability by handling transient failures, timeouts, and providing graceful degradation.

tasks.title: Create agent-caller.js utility with hybrid calling strategy
tasks.description: Create new agent-caller.js utility that implements hybrid agent calling: Task tool (primary) with ccw cli fallback. Includes dynamic retry mechanism (3-5 attempts), timeout control (120s), exponential backoff, and comprehensive error handling.

modification_points.change: Create complete agent-caller.js with callPlanningAgent function

implementation: Create .claude/commands/learn/_internal/agent-caller.js file
Import dependencies: Logger from ./logger.js, lastJsonObjectFromText from ./json-parser.js
Implement callPlanningAgent(context, logger) async function
Method 1: Task tool attempt with try-catch
Call Task with subagent_type learn-planning-agent, run_in_background false, prompt with context
Parse JSON result and validate structure
Log success with logger.info including kp_count
On error, log warning and proceed to Method 2
Method 2: ccw cli fallback with retry loop
Read agent template from .claude/agents/learn-planning-agent.md
Build CLI prompt with template + context JSON
Escape single quotes for shell using replace function
Implement retry loop (1-5 attempts) with dynamic backoff
For each attempt: execute Bash with timeout parameter (120000ms)
Parse JSON using lastJsonObjectFromText from Phase 1
Handle timeout errors: retry up to 5 times with exponential backoff (2^attempt seconds)
Handle other errors: retry up to 3 times
Log each attempt with logger.warn on failure
Return plan on success, throw on final failure
Add comprehensive error logging with logger.error for complete failure
Export callPlanningAgent for use in plan.md

callPlanningAgent function exported and callable

Create agent-caller.js utility with:

- Timeout control: 120s
- Exponential backoff: 2^attempt seconds
